name: Do I need a lawyer for my work back injury in Salt Lake?
description: Yes, they win denied claims and max benefits—no fee unless you win.

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for my work back injury in Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, they win denied claims and max benefits—no fee unless you win.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, strongly recommended; insurers deny 40%+ back claims initially.**

Utah attorneys win hearings for wages, medicals, impairments when carriers fight.[1] Free until win.

- Handle filings, appeals.
- Counter 'not at work' denials.
- Maximize settlement.

Call for consult; self-handling risks less benefits.[1] Essential for complications.
